case_title: RALPH RACHAL VS. TENGIZ IOSEBASHVILI ROYAL LOAN CO.

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 02/08/18/. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

PER COURT ORDER (SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL THE JUDGMENT FILED BY TENGIZ IOSEBASHVILI SET FOR FEB-23-2018 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-23-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR HEARING ON REQUEST TO CANCEL OR CORRECT THE JUDGMENT. CONTINUED FOR PRESENCE OF THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT FILES CHANGE OF ADDRESS. DEFENDANT'S NAME IS CORRECTED TO TENGIZ IOSEBASHVILI DBA ROYAL LOAN CO. JUDGE: CECILIA CASTELLANOS; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PER COURT ORDER (SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT FILED BY TENGIZ IOSEBASHVILI IS GRANTED.
